hero.tagline: From origin to your table, with full traceability
hero.subtitle: Premium specialty coffee and comprehensive food distribution for international markets

about.title: Your Strategic Partner in International Trade
about.p1: At Global Distribuidora y Comercializadora, C.A., we don't just import and export — we eliminate the logistical barriers that slow your access to high-quality food products.
about.p2: We manage the complexity of cross-border trade from start to finish so you can focus on growing your business.

coffee.title: Premium Specialty Coffee
coffee.description: We select premium and specialty lots with full traceability from farm to roaster. Every bean tells an origin story.
points: Hand-selected premium and specialty coffee beans
Rigorous quality control on every lot
Aroma and flavor profile preservation throughout the chain

food.title: Comprehensive Food Distribution
food.description: From fresh products with impeccable cold chain to dry and packaged goods. Your cargo arrives at destination in optimal conditions.
points: Speed and safety in every shipment

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To connect global markets with superior-quality food products by importing and exporting exceptional coffee and providing robust logistics solutions for the efficient distribution and commercialization of all types of food products.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To become a leading global benchmark in the food supply chain, recognized for our excellence in gourmet coffee and our agile and innovative distribution capabilities, setting the standards for trust, efficiency, and sustainability in international trade.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Next Shipment
contact.subtitle: Receive a personalized quote in less than 24 hours

footer.description: Import, export and distribution of premium coffee and superior quality food products.
